metadata.title: Just Can't Get Enough (Schizo Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:38.13] When I'm with you baby
[00:40.04] I go out of my head
[00:41.66] And I just can't get enough
[00:43.59] And I just can't get enough
[00:45.68] All the things you do to me
[00:47.40] And everything you said
[00:49.29] I just can't get enough
[00:51.06] I just can't get enough
[00:53.44] We slip and slide as we fall in love
[00:56.59] And I just can't seem to get enough of
[01:02.79] 
[01:16.19] We walk together
[01:17.44] We're walking down the street
[01:19.30] And I just can't get enough
[01:21.26] And I just can't get enough
[01:23.49] Every time I think of you
[01:24.97] I know we have to meet
[01:26.89] And I just can't get enough
[01:28.74] And I just can't get enough
[01:31.10] It's getting hotter, it's a burning love
[01:34.21] And I just can't seem to get enough of
[01:40.38] 
[02:46.59] And when it rains
[02:47.91] You're shining down for me
[02:49.82] And I just can't get enough
[02:51.70] And I just can't get enough
[02:54.03] Just like a rainbow
[02:55.55] You know you set me free
[02:57.30] And I just can't get enough
[02:59.22] And I just can't get enough
[03:01.62] You're like an angel and you give me your love
[03:04.75] And I just can't seem to get enough of
[03:10.89] 
[04:03.42] Just can't seem to get enough

[05:43.40] Just can't seem to get enough
